requirement_summary: Personally identifiable information (PII) shared with foreign governments must be minimized and anonymized unless a lawful derogation; retention max 3 years unless court order.
Collection must be necessary and proportionate; bulk transfers without case linkage prohibited.
Reciprocal access required for any automated data exchange.
Independent oversight with public reporting at least annually.
Dispute resolution must include binding timelines and an escalation path.
On-site verification permitted subject to notice; denial triggers suspension pending review.
